features.featureTitle: Remove the custom student login form (email + unique code fields) from the Login page. Replace it with an Internet Identity login button for students. When a student clicks the button, trigger the Internet Identity authentication flow using the existing useInternetIdentity hook. After successful authentication, check if the student's principal is approved in the backend; if approved, redirect to the student dashboard. If not yet approved, show a message that their account is pending admin approval.

Update the student-facing layouts and route guards to use the Internet Identity principal (from useInternetIdentity hook) instead of any localStorage-based custom auth token or unique code for determining if a student is logged in. The StudentLayout sidebar logout button should call the Internet Identity logout function. Do not change the AdminLayout or any admin route guards.
